hero.headline: Financial value is created between the lines.
hero.subheadline: Explore integrated solutions that align investing, operations, and insight at enterprise scale.

executiveSpotlight.headline: Dakota Live: Inside SEI:
executiveSpotlight.body: CEO Ryan Hicke–joined by Michael Lane, Head of Asset Management, and Sean Lawlor, Head of our Traditional Investment Managers business– shares insights on leadership, culture, and how SEI is prioritizing client-centric growth and innovation.
executiveSpotlight.quote: Innovation across areas like alternatives, tokenization, data, and technology — including AI — is shaping better outcomes for clients.

hero.headline: Summit Wealth broke away and never looked back.
hero.subheadline: See how a BD-affiliated advisor built a thriving independent RIA with SEI's technology, operations, and transition support.

executiveSpotlight.headline: Hear from Randy Morris, CFP®
executiveSpotlight.body: Watch the Dakota Live conversation with Ryan Hicke, SEI CEO — and hear directly from an advisor who made the move.
executiveSpotlight.quote: A partner like SEI was an important part of our decision-making process.

suggestedContent.headline: BD to RIA: Your transition roadmap.
suggestedContent.body: Understand the key decisions, timelines, and support structures for making the move from a broker-dealer to full independence.

suggestedContent.headline: Simplify your operations from day one.
suggestedContent.body: SEI's integrated platform handles custody, compliance, billing, and reporting — so you can focus on your clients.

suggestedContent.headline: Model your independence economics.
suggestedContent.body: Our interactive tool helps you see the real financial picture of going independent — revenue, costs, and break-even timeline.

personalizationPrompt.label: Personalize Your Experience
personalizationPrompt.question: What type of transition is your firm considering?

businessAudit.headline: Business Audit
businessAudit.body: The Business Audit measures your business across eight key focus areas. By diagnosing your core firm vitals, we can help you understand gaps, identify opportunities, and find the momentum and clarity you need to reach your important milestones.
